few_shot_examples.question: how many agents are there
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_users WHERE is_deleted = false

few_shot_examples.question: how many active agents are there
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_users WHERE status = 'active' AND is_deleted = false

few_shot_examples.question: how many transactions were in january 2025
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_transaction WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+$', '')::bigint)) = 1 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+$', '')::bigint)) = 2025

few_shot_examples.question: how many pay-in transactions were in january 2025
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_transaction WHERE transaction_type = 'pay_in' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+$', '')::bigint)) = 1 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+$', '')::bigint)) = 2025

few_shot_examples.question: total transaction amount for january 2025
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) FROM user_transaction WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+$', '')::bigint)) = 1 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+$', '')::bigint)) = 2025

few_shot_examples.question: total transaction volume for this month
few_shot_examples.sql: SELECT SUM(transaction_amount::numeric) FROM user_transaction WHERE EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+', '')::bigint)) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_TIMESTAMP(REGEXP_REPLACE(created_at::text, '\.\d+', '')::bigint)) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
